**The problem**

<!-- What do you keep doing by hand / what does the memory miss today? -->

**The idea**

<!-- What should happen instead? A concrete example beats an abstract wish. -->

**Fit check**

Nevertwice stays local-first, zero-dependency, and quiet until it has something
worth saying. If the idea needs a server, a database, or tokens on every turn,
say why it is worth breaking one of those rules.
